validation.notes: High findings (editor role, JSON.parse) fixed in iteration 1

findings.title: Media API fetches all records before filtering
findings.description: Fetches all media records then filters in memory. Could be more efficient with database-level filtering.
findings.fixRecommendation: Consider adding database-level filters when businessId is known

findings.title: SKU count fetched unnecessarily in some paths
findings.description: getSubscriptionInfo always counts SKUs even when caller doesn't need it
findings.fixRecommendation: Accept optional parameter to skip SKU counting when not needed

findings.title: Client-side fetch bypasses CDN cache on pricing page
findings.description: Client-side fetch means CDN cache not utilized for initial page load

findings.title: Potential composite index on (active, sort_order)
findings.description: Plans table would benefit from composite index for active plan queries

fixesApplied.fix: Added 'editor' role to admin checks to match other endpoints
Wrapped JSON.parse in try-catch with empty array fallback

positiveFindings: Plans schema well-designed with proper indexes
Migration uses INSERT OR IGNORE for idempotency
Zod validation added for input sanitization
Proper error handling with structured responses
XSS protection via escapeHtml working correctly
